empty.title: Welcome — no attempts yet
empty.subtitle: Start with a topic or look at items due today:

miniWeak.title: ⚠️ Mini-weaknesses detected
miniWeak.subtitle: Items where your last attempt was weaker than before:

study.title: 🎯 Topic Training
study.subtitle: 3-Phase Active Recall per topic
study.noItems: No items available for this topic

blurt.title: Phase 1: Blurting (Free Recall)
blurt.instruction: Write down EVERYTHING you know about this topic.
blurt.answerPlaceholder: Write everything that comes to mind …

application.title: Phase 3: Real Exam Task
application.instruction: Solve this original task as completely as you can.

complete.title: 🎉 Topic complete
complete.subtitle: All phases for this topic completed.
complete.stats: You scored {earned} of {total} points in this session.

review.title: 🔁 Due Today
review.subtitle: SM-2 Spaced Repetition · items with next_review_at ≤ today

empty.title: ✨ All done!
empty.subtitle: No reviews due today. Come back later or start a new topic.

exam.title: 📝 Exam Simulation
exam.subtitle: 90-Min IHK-style exam (FA 235 layout)
exam.stubText: This will host the exam simulation with IHK-style layout (Serif, A4, points column on right), 90-min timer, and all original AP2 exams from S2022.

cheatsheet.title: 📋 Cheatsheets
cheatsheet.subtitle: Own markdown summaries per topic
cheatsheet.noTopic: Pick a topic on the left to write your cheatsheet.
cheatsheet.tip: Tip: Writing it yourself anchors knowledge deeper than reading (Generation Effect). Print as PDF before exam.

prefs.title: 🎛 Learning Preferences
prefs.subtitle: Fine-tune the training-wheels mode and module mastery. Applies to all modules — per item you can still toggle training wheels on/off in the runner.

targets.title: 🎯 Head-streak target
targets.hint: How many correct answers in a row (wheels off) until an item sticks. On failures the target adapts up to {max}.
targets.rangeHint: Target range: {base} – {max} hits in a row

recovery.title: 🔧 Recovery behavior on failures
recovery.hint: How much does the target rise when you fail an item? Recovery kicks in from the 2nd failure.

stuetzrad.title: 🪄 Training-wheels default
stuetzrad.hint: Should training wheels be ON automatically when you open an item?

mastery.title: 🏆 Module mastery — how strict?
mastery.hint: When does a module count as completed?

anlagen.title: 📎 Appendix Library
anlagen.subtitle: All exam appendices (network plans, ER models, datasheets) — annotatable
anlagen.emptySubtitle: The gallery shows digitised appendices from real IHK exams since 2022.
anlagen.emptyHint1: Admin upload via a future tool (planned)
anlagen.emptyHint2: PDF pages extracted from AP2 folder
anlagen.emptyHint3: Hotspots positioned manually for labeling practice
